title: CBDT Issues Corrigenda for ITR Forms (ITR-1, 2, 3, 4, 6) on April 24, 2026
content:
# CBDT Issues Corrigenda for ITR Forms (ITR-1, 2, 3, 4, 6) on April 24, 2026

Ek important update hai! The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Income Tax Return (ITR) Forms ITR-1, ITR-2, ITR-3, ITR-4, aur ITR-6 se related notifications mein corrigenda announce kiye hain. Yeh updates April 24, 2026 ko jaari kiye gaye hain.

*   **What's New:** CBDT ne ITR-1 & 4, ITR-2, ITR-3, aur ITR-6 forms se associated notifications mein corrigenda issue kiye hain.
*   **Purpose:** Ye corrigenda generally notifications mein existing inconsistencies aur drafting errors ko address karne ke liye hote hain, taaki tax reporting aur clarity improve ho sake.
*   **Date of Issuance:** These corrigenda were issued on April 24, 2026.
*   Taxpayers aur professionals ko advise kiya jaata hai ki latest forms aur notifications ko refer karein, especially Assessment Year 2026-27 ke liye return file karte time.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/news-e-campaigns)

*Published on: 26 April 2026*
